# Chat Screen Inventory — tradeguruelectrical

**Last updated:** 2026-03-14
**Generated by:** `/get-screen-inventory chat`
**Source files:** `ChatView.swift`, `ChatInputBar.swift`, `ModeInfoCard.swift`, `ModeSelector.swift`, `ThinkingMode.swift`, `TradeGuruColors.swift`, `ViewModels/ChatViewModel.swift`, `Models/ChatMessage.swift`, `Models/Conversation.swift`, `Models/ContentBlock.swift`, `Models/MockData.swift`, `Views/MessageBubble.swift`, `Views/Blocks/TextBlockView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/StepListView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/WarningCardView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/CodeBlockView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/PartsListView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/RegulationView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/TableBlockView.swift`, `Views/Blocks/CalloutView.swift`

---

## Instructions

This document tracks every interactive element on the **Chat** screen.

### How to use this document
- Items are numbered sequentially within each category (restart at 1 per section)
- Each item shows: number, name, location (file:line), current logic, and backend status
- Run `/get-screen-inventory chat` to refresh this inventory
- Use the Priority list at the bottom to plan backend work before adding new screens
- Items removed between scans are marked `removed`, never deleted

### Document sections
1. **Summary** — Quick counts per category with logic/backend breakdown
2. **Buttons** — Every tappable element with its action status
3. **Icons** — Every icon with SF Symbol name and purpose
4. **Inputs** — Every form element with binding and submit status
5. **Components** — Every composite view with props and logic
6. **Text Elements** — Every text with dynamic/static classification
7. **State Variables** — Every @State/@Binding/@Observable with ownership
8. **Action Items** — What needs wiring before adding complexity
9. **Color Tokens** — Design token reference (if color extension exists)
10. **StockTake** — Audit trail of when inventory was checked and what changed

### Status definitions
| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `wired` | Has real logic — action does something |
| `empty` | Action closure is `{}` or value goes nowhere |
| `needs-backend` | Requires API call, data model, or persistence |
| `decorative` | Visual only — no logic needed |
| `removed` | Was in previous scan, no longer found |

## Buttons

| # | Name | SF Symbol | File | Line | Status | Current Logic | Backend Needed |
|---|------|-----------|------|------|--------|---------------|----------------|
| 1 | Hamburger menu | `line.3.horizontal` | `ChatView.swift` | 95 | wired | Sets `showSidebar = true` with animation, opens SidebarView overlay | NO — local navigation |
| 2 | New chat | `square.and.pencil` | `ChatView.swift` | 108 | wired | Calls `viewModel.newConversation(mode: selectedMode)` — creates new Conversation, inserts at top, sets as active | NO — wired to ViewModel (needs-backend for persistence) |
| 3 | Mode card dismiss (X) | `xmark` | `ModeInfoCard.swift` | 29 | wired | Calls `onDismiss` closure → sets `showModeCard = false` with animation | NO — fully wired |
| 4 | Fault Finder mode tab | `bolt.fill` | `ModeSelector.swift` | 9 | wired | Sets `selectedMode = .faultFinder` with animation | YES — mode switch should configure AI system prompt |
| 5 | Learn mode tab | `book.fill` | `ModeSelector.swift` | 9 | wired | Sets `selectedMode = .learn` with animation | YES — same as above |
| 6 | Research mode tab | `magnifyingglass` | `ModeSelector.swift` | 9 | wired | Sets `selectedMode = .research` with animation | YES — same as above |
| 7 | Send message | `arrow.up.circle.fill` | `ChatInputBar.swift` | 69 | wired | Calls `onSend?(text, nil)`, clears text. ChatView passes closure that calls `viewModel.send(text, mode: selectedMode, attachments: attachments)` and clears `inputText`. Currently triggers `simulateResponse` with mock blocks. | YES — needs real AI API call instead of mock simulation |
| 8 | Attachment cancel | `plus` (rotated 45°) | `ChatInputBar.swift` | 22 | wired | Sets `attachmentActive = false`, clears `selectedItem` with animation | NO — fully wired |

| 1 | ModeInfoCard | `ModeInfoCard.swift` | `mode: ThinkingMode`, `onDismiss: () -> Void` | wired | Displays mode icon + title + description. Dismissible with X. Reappears on mode change. | NO — reads from ThinkingMode enum |
| 2 | ModeSelector | `ModeSelector.swift` | `@Binding selectedMode: ThinkingMode` | wired | 3 tabs (Fault Finder, Learn, Research) with icon + name + short description. Highlights active. | YES — mode change should configure AI system prompt |
| 3 | ChatInputBar | `ChatInputBar.swift` | `@Binding text`, `@Binding selectedMode`, `onSend: ((String, [MessageAttachment]?) -> Void)?` | wired | Contains ModeSelector, text field, attachment picker, send button. Thin material background. | YES — attachment processing not complete |
| 4 | MessageBubble | `Views/MessageBubble.swift` | `message: ChatMessage` | wired | Renders user bubble (green, right-aligned) or assistant bubble (surface bg, left-aligned with block views). Shows timestamp + mode icon. | NO — rendering logic complete |
| 5 | TextBlockView | `Views/Blocks/TextBlockView.swift` | `content: String` | wired | Renders text content block | NO |
| 6 | StepListView | `Views/Blocks/StepListView.swift` | `title: String?`, `steps: [String]` | wired | Renders numbered step list | NO |
| 7 | WarningCardView | `Views/Blocks/WarningCardView.swift` | `content: String` | wired | Renders warning callout with icon | NO |
| 8 | CodeBlockView | `Views/Blocks/CodeBlockView.swift` | `content: String`, `language: String?` | wired | Renders code block with monospace styling | NO |
| 9 | PartsListView | `Views/Blocks/PartsListView.swift` | `items: [PartsItem]` | wired | Renders parts/materials list | NO |
| 10 | RegulationView | `Views/Blocks/RegulationView.swift` | `code: String?`, `clause: String?`, `summary: String?` | wired | Renders regulation citation card | NO |
| 11 | TableBlockView | `Views/Blocks/TableBlockView.swift` | `headers: [String]?`, `rows: [[String]]` | wired | Renders data table | NO |
| 12 | CalloutView | `Views/Blocks/CalloutView.swift` | `content: String`, `style: String?` | wired | Renders styled callout (tip, important, info) | NO |

## State Variables

| # | Name | Type | Owner | File | Line | Status | What It Controls |
|---|------|------|-------|------|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | `viewModel` | `ChatViewModel` | `ChatView` | `ChatView.swift` | 4 | wired | All chat logic: conversations list, active conversation, send/receive, streaming state |
| 2 | `selectedMode` | `ThinkingMode` | `ChatView` | `ChatView.swift` | 5 | wired | Active thinking mode — drives card content, selector highlight, mock response type |
| 3 | `inputText` | `String` | `ChatView` | `ChatView.swift` | 6 | wired | Text field content — bound to ChatInputBar, cleared on send |
| 4 | `showModeCard` | `Bool` | `ChatView` | `ChatView.swift` | 7 | wired | Card visibility — true on mode change, false on dismiss |
| 5 | `showSidebar` | `Bool` | `ChatView` | `ChatView.swift` | 8 | wired | Sidebar overlay visibility — toggled by hamburger button |
| 6 | `attachmentActive` | `Bool` | `ChatInputBar` | `ChatInputBar.swift` | 8 | wired | Attachment state — toggles plus icon to X, tracks photo selection |
| 7 | `selectedItem` | `PhotosPickerItem?` | `ChatInputBar` | `ChatInputBar.swift` | 9 | wired | Selected photo/video from PhotosPicker — triggers attachmentActive |

### ChatViewModel State (non-@State, @Observable properties)

| # | Name | Type | Owner | File | Line | Status | What It Controls |
|---|------|------|-------|------|------|--------|-----------------|
| 8 | `conversations` | `[Conversation]` | `ChatViewModel` | `ChatViewModel.swift` | 6 | wired | All conversation history — initialized from MockData |
| 9 | `activeConversation` | `Conversation?` | `ChatViewModel` | `ChatViewModel.swift` | 7 | wired | Currently displayed conversation — set to first mock conversation on init |
| 10 | `isStreaming` | `Bool` | `ChatViewModel` | `ChatViewModel.swift` | 8 | needs-backend | Streaming state flag — set during `simulateResponse`, not yet used in UI for indicator |
| 11 | `streamingBlocks` | `[ContentBlock]` | `ChatViewModel` | `ChatViewModel.swift` | 9 | needs-backend | Blocks being streamed in — accumulated during simulation, not yet rendered progressively |
| 12 | `selectedMode` | `ThinkingMode` | `ChatViewModel` | `ChatViewModel.swift` | 10 | wired | Synced from ChatView's onChange — used to update mode context |

## Action Items

Items needing backend or logic before this screen is functional:

### Priority 1 — Core (app cannot function without these)

| # | Item | What's Needed | Why | Blocked By |
|---|------|--------------|-----|------------|
| 1 | AI API integration | Replace `simulateResponse()` mock with real OpenAI Assistants API streaming call | The core intelligence — currently returns hardcoded mock blocks | Nothing |
| 2 | Mode → system prompt mapping | Each ThinkingMode maps to a different AI system prompt in the API call | Mode tabs change UI but don't change AI behavior | #1 |

### Priority 2 — Essential UX (app works but feels broken)

| # | Item | What's Needed | Why | Blocked By |
|---|------|--------------|-----|------------|
| 3 | Streaming response indicator | Use `isStreaming` and `streamingBlocks` to show progressive block rendering / typing indicator | Users need feedback that the AI is responding | #1 |
| 4 | Photo attachment processing | Load selected `PhotosPickerItem` → convert to Data → create `MessageAttachment` → pass to `onSend` | Picker works but selected media is never attached to the message | Nothing |
| 5 | Conversation persistence | Local storage (SwiftData or file) for conversations instead of in-memory MockData | Conversations lost on app restart | Nothing |

### Priority 3 — Polish (nice to have)

| # | Item | What's Needed | Why | Blocked By |
|---|------|--------------|-----|------------|
| 6 | Link block tap action | Make link blocks in MessageBubble tappable to open URL in Safari | Links are styled but not interactive | Nothing |
| 7 | Copy code block | Add copy button to CodeBlockView | Users need to copy code/formulas from responses | Nothing |
| 8 | Scroll to bottom on new message | Auto-scroll ScrollView to latest message when new message arrives | Messages may be off-screen | Nothing |

## StockTake

| Date | Action | Wired | Empty | Needs Backend | Total | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|-------|---------------|-------|-------|
| 2026-03-14 | initial scan | 12 | 10 | 10 | 32 | First inventory — many buttons empty, no ViewModel |
| 2026-03-14 | refresh | 32 | 0 | 8 | 44 | Major progress: ChatViewModel added with send/receive/mock streaming, MessageBubble with 8 block renderers, all buttons wired. Sidebar excluded per request. Remaining backend: real AI API, attachment processing, persistence. |
